text: The Vision of the Measuring Line

segments.text: Then I lifted up my eyes and saw a man with a measuring line in his hand.
Where are you going?
segments.speaker: Narrator

segments.text: I asked.
To measure Jerusalem,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: he replied,
and to determine its width and length.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then the angel who was speaking with me went out, and another angel came out to meet him
and said to him,
Run and tell that young man: ‘Jerusalem will be a city without walls because of the multitude of men and livestock within it.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For I will be a wall of fire around it, declares the LORD, and I will be the glory within it.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Get up! Get up! Flee from the land of the north,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD,
for I have scattered you like the four winds of heaven,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
Get up, O Zion! Escape, you who dwell with the Daughter of Babylon!
segments.speaker: Prophet

segments.text: For this is what the LORD of Hosts says:
After His Glory has sent Me against the nations that have plundered you—for whoever touches you touches the apple of His eye—
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: I will surely wave My hand over them, so that they will become plunder for their own servants. Then you will know that the LORD of Hosts has sent Me.
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

segments.text: Shout for joy and be glad, O Daughter of Zion, for I am coming to dwell among you,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
On that day many nations will join themselves to the LORD, and they will become My people. I will dwell among you, and you will know that the LORD of Hosts has sent Me to you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And the LORD will take possession of Judah as His portion in the Holy Land, and He will once again choose Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Be silent before the LORD, all people, for He has roused Himself from His holy dwelling.
segments.speaker: Prophet
